category_or_quota: All India and Gujarat Category – published base fee
notes: Annual and four-year tuition are calculated at the published 2026 semester rate. Annual food is calculated as INR 5,500 x 12 months. Fees are subject to 8–10% annual revision, so no fixed four-year total is asserted. First-year current-rate institutional cash outflow excluding food is INR 490,600.
Includes INR 18,000 SHILP course after semester 2 and approximately INR 25,000 chip-design/fabrication course in semester 4. Additional value-added courses may be announced.
